# Rahul Ranjan - Independent SEO Expert & Digital Marketing Consultant

> Independent SEO Expert and Digital Marketing Consultant based in Biratnagar, Nepal. Technical SEO, Google Analytics 4, social media strategy, lead generation, and content marketing. Also a Full Stack Developer (React, Node.js, Django). Director of Marketing at Dragon Insurance (US-based). Available for freelance SEO and digital marketing projects globally.

## About

Rahul Ranjan is an independent SEO expert and digital marketing consultant based in Biratnagar, Koshi Province, Nepal. He specialises in technical SEO, keyword strategy, Google Analytics 4 implementation, and lead generation for Nepal businesses and international clients.

He currently serves as Director of Marketing at Dragon Insurance, a US-based insurance company, managing all digital marketing, SEO strategy, GA4 analytics, and lead generation remotely from Nepal. He is also a Full Stack Developer, which means he implements SEO changes directly in code without requiring a separate developer.

Key credentials:
- Independent SEO Expert: technical SEO audits, keyword research (Ahrefs Pro), schema markup, Core Web Vitals optimisation, Google Search Console
- Google Analytics 4 certified: custom event tracking, conversion goals, Looker Studio dashboards
- Full Stack Developer: React, Next.js, Node.js, Django, PostgreSQL -- able to implement SEO fixes directly
- Nepal market expertise: local keyword research, Nepal business directories, eSewa/Khalti integrations
- Based in Biratnagar, Koshi Province, Nepal (available in-person locally, all project work done remotely)

## Services

- [SEO Expert Services Nepal](https://www.rahulranjan.com.np/services/seo-services-nepal.html) -- Technical SEO, keyword strategy, schema markup, Core Web Vitals
- [Digital Marketing Services Nepal](https://www.rahulranjan.com.np/digital-marketing-nepal.html) -- SEO, social media, GA4, lead generation
- [Website Design & Web Development Nepal](https://www.rahulranjan.com.np/services/web-development-nepal.html) -- React, Next.js, Node.js, Django

- [SaaS Development Nepal](https://www.rahulranjan.com.np/services/saas-development-nepal.html)
